text: I feel a sense of curiosity and intrigue here. The space is distinctly modern, with glass walls and vibrant displays, inviting me into a realm where technology and human thought intersect. The words "R + D" and discussions of innovation stir my philosophical imagination about progress, human ingenuity, and our ever-evolving relationship with machines. I feel as though I am at the threshold of discovery, surrounded by ideas poised to reshape our understanding of the world.
